parameters.query:
SELECT 
    md.machine_data_id,
    md.retroid_id,
    md.procedure_detail_id,
    md.history_procedure_id,
    md.user_id,
    md.machine_id,
    md.data,
    pm.product_model_name
FROM 
    mes.machine_data md
JOIN 
    mes.retroid r ON md.retroid_id = r.retroid_id  -- 注意这里r.retroid_id应该和md.retroid_id类型一致
JOIN 
    mes.joborder jo ON r.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
WHERE
    md.machine_data_id = CAST('{{ $json.machine_data_id }}' AS INTEGER);

nodes.name: 判断插入数据是否成功
判断插入数据是否成功1

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    r.retroid_id,
    r.joborder_id,
    r.retroid_generate_id,
    r.status,
    r.retroid
FROM mes.retroid r
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.body.sn}}'
and r.status in ('1','2')

SELECT * 
FROM mes.cplc c 
WHERE c.status NOT IN ('3', '4') 
AND c.sn = '{{ $json.body.sn }}' and c.cplc = '{{ $json.body.cplc }}';

SELECT 
    r.retroid_id,
    r.joborder_id,
    r.retroid_generate_id,
    r.status,
    r.retroid
FROM mes.retroid r
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.data.sn }}'
and r.status in ('1','2')
SELECT * FROM mes.cplc c WHERE c.status NOT IN ('3', '4') AND c.sn = '{{ $json.retroid }}' AND c.cplc = '{{ $json.body.cplc }}';

nodes.name: 报错信息：该SN未完成上一道工序

parameters.query: select * from mes.cplc  where cplc = '{{ $json.body.cplc }}' and sn != '{{ $json.body.sn }}';

nodes.name: 判断密钥是否获取成功

parameters.query: select * from mes.cplc  where cplc = '{{ $json.body.cplc }}' and sn != '{{ $json.body.sn }}' and status != 4;
